_comment: Canned game responses for Gantry's MockGameClient. Used when mockMode: true in gantry.json.
_usage: MockGameClient matches incoming tool calls to responses by action name. The 'default' key is returned when no specific match exists. Extend this file to cover more actions or add alternate response states.

login._comment: Returned for login() calls. session_id is ignored by proxy — included for structure.

get_status._comment: Full status snapshot. Real agents should use get_credits/get_fuel/get_location instead.

get_system._comment: Returns mock system data for nexus_core.

system.name: Nexus Core
system.description: A bustling hub system at the heart of Solarian space.

pois.name: Nexus Station
pois.description: Central trading hub and refueling point.

pois.name: Alpha Belt
pois.description: Iron-rich asteroid field. Good for new miners.

travel_to._comment: Returns completed travel. docked_at_base populated when arriving at a station.

travel_to_station._comment: Override for travel to station POIs. MockGameClient uses this when id contains 'station'.

mine._comment: Single mine call. Real agents use batch_mine instead.

batch_mine._comment: Bulk mine call (20 mines). Returns aggregate results. Stops early if cargo full.

scan._comment: System scan results. Returns a mix of NPC targets.

analyze_market._comment: Market analysis at current station. Returns trading recommendations.

recommendations.reason: Strong buy demand at this station. Best price nearby.
High demand. Craft iron_ore first for 3x value.

multi_sell._comment: Bulk sell call. Returns credits earned per item.

craft._comment: Crafting call. Returns the crafted item added to cargo.

missions.name: Supply Run: Iron Ore
missions.description: Deliver 20 units of iron_ore to Kepler Station.

missions.name: Chart the Outer Belt
missions.description: Visit the Kepler Outer Belt and return with a survey.

captains_log_list._comment: Returns the last 3 captain's log entries.

entries.entry:
LOC: nexus_core
CR: 4200
DID: Mined 40 iron_ore and sold at nexus_station
NEXT: Try kepler_hub for better ore prices

read_doc._comment: Reads a stored agent doc (strategy, discoveries, market-intel). Returns empty for new agents.
read_doc.title: strategy

write_diary._comment: Appends a diary entry. Always succeeds in mock mode.

write_doc._comment: Writes/appends a doc. Always succeeds in mock mode.

captains_log_add._comment: Adds a captain's log entry. Always succeeds in mock mode.

default._comment: Fallback response for any action not listed above. Prevents agent errors on uncovered tools.
default._note: Add specific responses above for any tools your agent uses frequently. The default keeps sessions running without errors.
